name: Chips Ahoy Ice Cream Cake2
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts Ice cream, any combination flavors
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely roll out 20 Cookies.
2. Combine cookie crumbs and margarine.
3. Press onto bottom of a 9-inch springform pan or pie plate; set remaining cookies around the edge of the pan or pie plate.
4. Spread 3/4 cup fudge topping over prepared crust. Freeze for about 15 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, soften 1 quart ice cream. Spread softened ice cream over fudge layer. Freeze for about 30 minutes.
6. Scoop remaining ice cream into balls; arrange over the ice cream layer. Freeze until firm, about 4 hours overnight.
7. To serve, garnish with whipped topping, remaining fudge topping, strawberries or maraschino cherries. Serve immediately.
Makes 12 servings.
